calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-18-2015 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-28-2015 Continued To Aug-18-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Randolph Stein for and with (petitioner) Donna Hill. John Lewis (beneficiary) also present.

The Court stated that we are here for the first and final account and report, that the probate examiner had questions and sent notes, that a declaration was filed yesterday but not in time to be reviewed and that one of the issues is the request for statutory compensation. Mr. Stein stated that the statutory fee issue was resolved in July. The Court stated that the parties have waived accounting and that schedules of receipts with respect to gains and losses need to be fully completed. Mr. Stein stated that he cannot find anything wrong with the schedule, that he is at a loss as to how to improve it and that there is nothing in the current examiner's notes regarding a further breakdown of numbers. The Court stated that it has not yet reviewed the declaration and that it would be helpful to have one simple verified supplement stating what is on hand and what is to be distributed. Mr. Stein stated that the examiner's notes state "do not respond" and he is unable to communicate with her. The Court stated that the supplement needs to be verified by the administrator as to what is on hand, what is to be paid out and what is to be distributed. Mr. Stein stated that he has filed an amendment with everything requested. The Court suggested Mr. Stein talk to the examiner, listen to what is said, provide what the examiner wants and that it will work with what is available. The accounting petition was continued to August 18, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-07-2015 Continued To Jul-28-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-15-2015 Continued To Jul-07-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-09-2015 Continued To Jun-30-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Confirming Title Of Real Property To Decedent'S Estate.
Off Calendar Jun-06-2014 Advanced From Jun-25-14 To Jun-16-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Confirming Title Of Real Property To Decedent'S Estate.
Off Calendar Jun-16-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Randolph Stein for Donna Hill.

The Court inquired as to whether or not it has authority. Mr. Stein addressed the petition/court's concern, stated that the title company wants the information, and that there are beneficiaries under the trust that would be wiped out; there would be a $95,000.00 loss. The Court and counsel confer. The Court inquired about the need for paragraph three in the proposed order. Mr. Stein stated that it was superfulous. At the conclusion of discussions, the Court granted the petition (order signed with modifications/striking paragraph three in the order).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)
Advancing Hearing Date For Petition For Order Confirming Title Of Real Property To Decedent'S Estate

Petition For Order Confirming Title Of Real Property To Decedent'S Estate.
Off Calendar May-21-2014 Continued To Jun-25-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Jan-16-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Randolph Stein for Donna Hill (Petitioner).

Mr. Stein stated that they have not done an inventory, that he is not aware of any other asset other than the house that was brought into the Trust and that he is anticipating an 850 Petition. The Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed (subject to review of the order). Bond is set at $100,000.00. The holographic will is admitted.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Jan-02-2013 Continued To Jan-16-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
